nasb.text: “I have forsaken My house, I have abandoned My inheritance; I have given the beloved of My soul Into the hand of her enemies.

esv.text: “I have forsaken my house; I have abandoned my heritage; I have given the beloved of my soul into the hands of her enemies.

cnv.text: “我撇下了我的家， 丟棄了我的產業； 我把我心愛的 交在她仇敵的手中。

ccb.text: “我已离开我的殿， 撇弃我的产业， 把我爱的子民交给他们的敌人。
